ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's image */,
  "bgg_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's Board Game Geek page */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "geek_rating" REAL /* Geek rating of the game */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the game */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required for the game */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed for the game */,
  "play_time" INTEGER /* Average play time in minutes */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum recommended age for the game */,
  "expansion_of" INTEGER /* ID of the base game if this game is an expansion (nullable) */,
  "language_dependency" TEXT /* Description of language dependency in the game */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Complexity rating of the game (0-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the designer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Designer's birthdate */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Designer's nationality */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the designer's official website (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the publisher's headquarters */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's official website (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the mechanic */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the mechanic icon (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_designer" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publisher" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_category" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mechanic" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, moderator, regular user) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image (nullable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: URL of the game's Board Game Geek page
Number of votes for the game
Minimum number of players required for the game
Maximum number of players allowed for the game
Minimum recommended age for the game
ID of the base game if this game is an expansion (nullable)
Description of language dependency in the game
URL of the designer's official website (nullable)
URL of the publisher's official website (nullable)
User role (e.g., admin, moderator, regular user)
URL of the user's profile image (nullable)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
